Description: Rewrite each day's cluster manifest to match the surviving renamed photos and integrate the deterministic cleanup stage into the main pipeline after Epic 2 clustering.

Stories.StoryDescription: Update `cluster_manifest.json` in place so rejected duplicates are removed, surviving filenames and relative paths are renamed, and summary counts match the surviving photos.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The day-level manifest becomes the post-cleanup source of truth and matches the filesystem after cleanup.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add a new deterministic cleanup stage to the main pipeline so Epic 3 always runs immediately after Epic 2 manifest generation.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Pipeline runs clustering first, then deterministic cleanup, without introducing any AI dependencies.

Stories.StoryDescription: Extend summaries and logging with duplicate rejection counts, rename counts, and manifest rewrite counts, and cover the new end-to-end behavior with tests.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Run summaries and logs report the cleanup results and the full automated test suite passes.
